response.title: Energy Analyst
response.description: GreenFuture Energy Solutions is seeking a knowledgeable and detail-oriented Energy Analyst to join our team. The ideal candidate will play a vital role in analyzing energy consumption data, developing energy efficiency strategies, and optimizing energy use across various projects. The Energy Analyst will work closely with cross-functional teams to support our mission of promoting sustainable energy solutions.

required_skills: Data analysis and visualization tools (e.g., Excel, Tableau)
Knowledge of renewable energy technologies (solar, wind, etc.)
Regulatory compliance understanding (EPA, state/local energy policies)
Experience with energy audits and assessments
Proficient in report writing and presentation skills
preferred_skills: Experience with predictive analytics and machine learning
Knowledge of financial modeling for energy projects
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Energy Management, Environmental Science, Engineering, or related field
